3 #include <functional>
4 #include <memory>
5 #include <optional>
6 
7 #include "franky/motion/cartesian_impedance_base.hpp"
8 #include "franky/wait_free_triple_buffer.hpp"
9 
10 namespace franky {
11 
20 using CartesianReferenceHandle = WaitFreeTripleBuffer<std::optional<CartesianReference>>;
21 
28 class CartesianImpedanceTrackingMotion : public CartesianImpedanceBase {
29  public:
30  using Params = CartesianImpedanceBase::Params;
31  using ReferenceCallback =
32  std::function<CartesianReference(const RobotState &, franka::Duration, franka::Duration, franka::Duration)>;
33 
34  explicit CartesianImpedanceTrackingMotion(const Params &params = Params{}, double gains_time_constant = 0.1);
35  explicit CartesianImpedanceTrackingMotion(
36  ReferenceCallback reference_callback, const Params &params = Params{}, double gains_time_constant = 0.1);
37 
38  void setReference(const CartesianReference &reference) {
39  reference.validate();
40  reference_handle_.set(reference);
41  }
42  [[nodiscard]] std::optional<CartesianReference> getReference() const { return reference_handle_.getLastWritten(); }
43 
44  [[nodiscard]] const Params &params() const { return base_params(); }
45 
46  protected:
47  void initImpl(const RobotState &robot_state, const std::optional<franka::Torques> &previous_command) override;
48  franka::Torques nextCommandImpl(
49  const RobotState &robot_state, franka::Duration time_step, franka::Duration rel_time, franka::Duration abs_time,
50  const std::optional<franka::Torques> &previous_command) override;
51 
52  private:
53  CartesianReferenceHandle reference_handle_{std::nullopt};
54  ReferenceCallback reference_callback_;
55  std::optional<Twist> target_twist_;
56  std::optional<TwistAcceleration> target_acceleration_;
57 };
58 
59 } // namespace franky
